creator: martin@arp242.net
text:
Please remove this port:

- It doesn't work (it needs to updated to the latest version for it to work)
- I don't have a FreeBSD machine available anymore, so I'm not likely to update it anytime soon.
- No one else offered a update in the months that its been broke, leading me to the conclusion that no one cares about this port.

Thanks ;-)
